strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_COMMANDO_GRANDMASTERY_DE: Komando olarak, Oyunu Tayfun zorluğunda bitir veya kendini yok et.
strings.SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_RECOLOR1_COMMANDO_DESC: As Commando, find the hidden Prismatic Crystal on Titanic Plains.
